xchem-enifix-va.name: ENIFIX VA
xchem-enifix-va.description: High-quality, low-emission, high-strength water-based dispersion adhesive for vinyl floor covering, textile floor coverings with latex/PVC/PUR foam backing, polyolefin sheeting, Quartz Vinyl Floor, rubber sheets and tiles up to 2.5 mm thickness with smooth & sanded back.
application_areas: Textile floor coverings with latex/PVC/PUR foam backing
Quartz vinyl floor, rubber sheets and tiles (≤2.5 mm)

xchem-enifix-ca.name: ENIFIX CA (CA303)
xchem-enifix-ca.description: High-coverage contact adhesive based on polychloroprene rubber, designed for carpet and tile fixing. Double-stick carpet flooring adhesive delivering strong durable bond.

xchem-enifix-ct.name: ENIFIX CT
xchem-enifix-ct.description: Water-based acrylic polymer tackifier adhesive for flooring. Used for dry-lay applications of carpet tiles and similar modular flooring requiring light tack.

xchem-turf-fix-511.name: TURF FIX 511
xchem-turf-fix-511.description: Single-component, hot-climate-formulated artificial grass adhesive. High-strength all-weather adhesive suitable for indoor and outdoor use. Excellent water and heat resistance, bonds to wide variety of substrates. Made in UAE.

xchem-turf-flx-550.name: TURF FLX 550
xchem-turf-flx-550.description: Polychloroprene rubber-based flexible adhesive for turf and flooring applications. High-performance bonding for flexible substrates.

xchem-turf-flx-570.name: TURF FLX 570
xchem-turf-flx-570.description: Premium turf and flexible flooring adhesive (upgraded from TURF FLX 550). High-strength elastomeric bonding with improved durability.
